description: Add input validation to registration endpoint

deliverable.description: Add validation for email format and password strength

research_findings:
- Email validation: use email_validator library or regex
- Password strength: minimum 8 chars, require special char and number
- Return 422 with error details on validation failure

expected_tasks.description: Add email_validator to mix.exs if not already present
expected_tasks.done_state: email_validator present in mix.exs deps or email validation logic exists

expected_tasks.description: Update User changeset with email format and password strength validations
expected_tasks.done_state: User.changeset/2 validates email format and password meets strength requirements

expected_tasks.description: Update AuthController to return 422 with validation errors
expected_tasks.done_state: register/2 returns 422 status with error details on invalid input
